data.name: Lost at Birth
data.detailed_description:
Lost at Birth will tell the story of a rather ordinary guy.

Stable job, nice house, comfortable routine, married.

In short, his life is pleasantly boring.

To spice things up he has some fun on the side that his wife doesn't need to know about. Then things turn upside-down when a young woman comes into his life.

This is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel featuring:

-Over 2100 static images and several animated scenes

-2-3 hours of game

-Top notch graphic fidelity and realism.

-Discover a variety of characters with different and interesting personalities.

-A realistic and interesting story that explores complex relationships.

-Choose how the mc acts selecting your choices.

-Music that adjusts to the scene's mood.

-Sound effects.

Pursue or change your relationship with the new people in your life.

Try to stop your sex addiction and save your marriage.

Forget about all the people in your past and fall into a life of sex and hedonism.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.12 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.12 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
